x-enumeration-literals.name: Life Insurance
x-enumeration-literals.description: Pays beneficiaries a lump sum when the insured person dies.

x-enumeration-literals.name: Funeral Policy
x-enumeration-literals.description: Covers funeral and burial/cremation costs, often paying out quickly.

x-enumeration-literals.name: Health Insurance
x-enumeration-literals.description: Covers medical expenses such as doctor visits, hospitalization, and treatments.

x-enumeration-literals.name: Car/Vehicle Insurance
x-enumeration-literals.description: Covers damage to a car, theft, or liability in case of accidents.

x-enumeration-literals.name: Homeowners Insurance
x-enumeration-literals.description: Covers damage to a house or contents due to fire, theft, or natural disasters.

x-enumeration-literals.name: Travel Insurance
x-enumeration-literals.description: Covers trip cancellations, medical emergencies abroad, lost luggage, and travel disru

x-enumeration-literals.name: Disability Insurance
x-enumeration-literals.description: Provides income replacement or financial support if the insured becomes unable to work due to illness, injury, or disability.

x-enumeration-literals.name: Critical Illness Insurance
x-enumeration-literals.description: Pays a lump sum benefit if the insured is diagnosed with a serious medical condition listed in the policy.
